title: glottiphyllum latum
intro: Glottiphyllum latum, also known as the flat-leaved living stone or living stone, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glottiphyllum latum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various infections. Herbal preparations of Glottiphyllum latum typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems to create teas, infusions, or topical ointments for medicinal use.
